primaryModmailWebhook.label: Discord Webhook 1 — Modmail (Primary)
primaryModmailWebhook.helpText: Discord webhook URL for modmail alerts. Also used for mod queue and new posts if Webhooks 3 or 5 are left blank.

secondaryModmailWebhook.label: Discord Webhook 2 — Modmail (Secondary)
secondaryModmailWebhook.helpText: Modmail alerts for a second subreddit. Configure Secondary Subreddit Name below. Falls back to Webhook 1 if left blank.

primaryModQueueWebhook.label: Discord Webhook 3 — Mod Queue (Primary)
primaryModQueueWebhook.helpText: Mod queue alerts (reports, AutoMod) for the primary subreddit. Falls back to Webhook 1 if left blank.

secondaryModQueueWebhook.label: Discord Webhook 4 — Mod Queue (Secondary)
secondaryModQueueWebhook.helpText: Mod queue alerts for the secondary subreddit. Falls back to Webhook 2 if left blank.

primaryNewPostsWebhook.label: Discord Webhook 5 — New Posts (Primary)
primaryNewPostsWebhook.helpText: New post alerts for the primary subreddit. Falls back to Webhook 1 if left blank.

secondaryNewPostsWebhook.label: Discord Webhook 6 — New Posts (Secondary)
secondaryNewPostsWebhook.helpText: New post alerts for the secondary subreddit. Falls back to Webhook 2 if left blank.

primaryClosedTicketsWebhook.label: Discord Webhook 7 — Closed Tickets (Primary)
primaryClosedTicketsWebhook.helpText: When a ticket is closed or resolved, its embed is moved here. Requires Discord Bot Token.

secondaryClosedTicketsWebhook.label: Discord Webhook 8 — Closed Tickets (Secondary)
secondaryClosedTicketsWebhook.helpText: Closed and resolved ticket archive for the secondary subreddit. Requires Discord Bot Token.

secondarySubredditName.label: Secondary Subreddit Name (optional)
secondarySubredditName.helpText: If you monitor a second subreddit, enter its name here (without r/). Events from this subreddit will use Webhooks 2, 4, 6, and 8.

reportingWebhook.label: Daily Report Webhook URL
reportingWebhook.helpText: Discord webhook for daily moderation reports. Sent once per day at 8 AM US Eastern.

discordApplicationPublicKey.label: Discord Application Public Key
discordApplicationPublicKey.helpText: From Discord Developer Portal → General Information → Public Key. Required to verify button interactions.

discordInteractionsWorkerUrl.label: Cloudflare Worker URL
discordInteractionsWorkerUrl.helpText: Your deployed Cloudflare Worker URL (e.g. https://modmail.your-name.workers.dev). Required for closed-ticket moves and Discord button metrics.

discordInteractionsWorkerSecret.label: Cloudflare Worker Shared Secret
discordInteractionsWorkerSecret.helpText: Must exactly match the WORKER_SECRET set on your Cloudflare Worker. Required for closed-ticket syncing.

discordBotToken.label: Discord Bot Token
discordBotToken.helpText: Required for Claim/Close/Reassign/Reopen buttons. From Discord Developer Portal → Bot → Reset Token. Must belong to the same application as your Interactions Endpoint URL. Also add as DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN on your Cloudflare Worker.

outgoing.label: Send outgoing mod messages to Discord

ignoreUsers.label: Ignore list (comma-separated usernames, no u/)
ignoreUsers.helpText: Reddit usernames (case-insensitive) to exclude from webhook alerts.

rolePing.label: Discord Role ID to Ping
rolePing.helpText: Enter a Discord Role ID to ping on new alerts. Leave blank to disable.

onlyModDiscussions.label: Only Sync Mod Discussions
onlyModDiscussions.helpText: If enabled, only internal mod discussion messages are sent to the webhook.
